description_long: This is a modern, rectangular desk lamp with a flat, broad base and a slim, elongated lamp head connected by a curved, sturdy arm. The base features a touch control panel with visible icons, likely for power and brightness adjustment. The lamp head is thin and rectangular, designed to provide a wide, even spread of light across a workspace. The arm is slightly arched, allowing the lamp head to extend over the base and provide optimal illumination. The overall design is minimalist, with smooth surfaces and a combination of matte and glossy finishes. The color scheme is primarily black and gray, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern desk lamp with a flat base, touch controls, and an arched arm supporting a slim rectangular lamp head. The design is minimalist and primarily black and gray.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular lamp head centered above the base, with the arm extending directly backward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the arched arm and the slim profile of the lamp head, as well as the touch control panel on the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the straight alignment of the arm and lamp head, with the base's full rectangular shape visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the arched arm and the lamp head extending over the base.
